1.content: Alright, we'll start out simple. Boy or girl?
1.title: The choice of choices

12.content:
And why are they now foregoing toilets?

Option 1: As the result of a dare or bet.

Option 2: They've been cursed to be unable to use toilets.

Option 3: They've been thrust into a world where toilets don't exist.

Option 4: They just thought it would be fun
12.title: Girl

121.content:
At twelve years old, Louise had already established a reputation for herself within her small town. She was known far and wide as "the girl who never refused a dare", and this was completely true. No matter how outlandish or embarrassing, Louise refused to turn down any dare whatsoever. Well, as long as it was physically possible, anyway.

Which brings us to the present day, as a few of the girl's friends tried to find a dare she wouldn't do. It was going exceptionally poorly.

"I can't believe you really ate seven bean burritos..." her friend Kris complained. "How does your stomach even work...?"

Her other friend, Anthony, had a contemplative look on his face. "Aha! I think I've got something that'll be too much, even for her! Louise, I dare you to stop using the toilet from now on!"

Kris gave him a weird look. "Um, she's still human. She can't just stop her bodily functions."

"I'm not asking her to." He replied. "She can still... do her business, anywhere but the toilet."

"You're on." The response from the until-now quiet Louise startled the both of them. "Wait, really?" the two asked simultaneously.

Louise just nodded. Even if it was gross, a dare was a dare.
121.title: Dare/Bet

1211.content:
"Good timing actually" Louise smirked. "those bean burritos go right through me, and now I no longer have to worry about finding a bathroom."

With that, she pulled down her shorts and panties and squatted down on the ground where she was standing.

"Wait, you're doing it right here?" Kris asked in disbelief.

"Sure, why not? He said anywhere, so it's most convenient to just stay where I am."

Kris's follow-up statement about privacy was cut off by a grunt and a loud fart as Louise started to do her business. Kris and Anthony found themselves unable to look away as their petite friend dropped the largest, goopiest load either of them had ever seen.

Louise gave a genuine smile as she pulled her pants back up. "Much better. I think I like this dare. In fact..." A mischievous smirk worked its way onto her lips. "I dare you guys to join me."
1211.title: Get started now

1351.content: You have chosen Rugrats. Which character will we focus on?
1351.title: Rugrats

13511.content: Where will Chuckie be spending the day?
13511.title: Chuckie Finster

135112.content: Was anyone at Tommy's house besides Tommy and Chuckie?
135112.title: Tommy's House

1351121.content:
One day, Tommy and Chuckie were playing in the sandbox in Tommy's backyard. The two toddlers were having a good time when all of a sudden, Chuckie started squirming uncomfortably. Tommy was quick to notice.

"Tommy, I gotta go potty!" Chuckie told Tommy.

"So go ahead and go, Chuckie. I'll be fine out here." Tommy assured Chuckie. As Tommy wore a diaper, he could go wherever and whenever he wanted.

"But Tommy, I don't think I can make it to the bathroom." Chuckie told Tommy. Tommy looked over at the tree, then he got an idea.

"I got a idea, Chuckie! Why don't you just pee on the tree?" Tommy asked Chuckie.

"I can't do that, Tommy!" Chuckie protested.

"Why not? Spike does it all the time." Tommy told Chuckie.

Chuckie wasn't sure what to do. He knew he couldn't make it to the potty, and he didn't want to pee on the tree, but he didn't want to pee his pants, either.

Does Chuckie decide to pee on the tree?
1351121.title: No, Just Tommy and Chuckie

13511211.content:
"Okay, Tommy. I'll do it!" Chuckie told Tommy. He ran up to the tree, then looked back in case Stu or Didi was watching.

Were they?
13511211.title: Yes

choices: Tommy Joins Chuckie in Peeing on the Tree
135112112.content:
Fortunately for Chuckie, neither Stu nor Didi was watching him. They were both inside, drinking coffee and talking to each other. Chuckie pulled down his pants and his underwear, then he started peeing on the tree and sighed with relief.

What happens next?
135112112.title: No

choices: Chuckie Pulls His Pants Back Up
1351121121.content:
Tommy walked up to Chuckie and was impressed when he saw him peeing on the tree.

"Wow, Chuckie! That looks like fun! I wanna try it!" Tommy exclaimed. He then untaped his diaper, which was still dry, and let it fall to the ground. Shortly after taking his diaper off, Tommy started peeing on the tree and sighed with relief.

"It feels nice not to need my diapie changed." Tommy said as he continued going pee. The two toddlers continued to pee on the tree until at last, their bladders were empty.

What happens next?
1351121121.title: Tommy Joins Chuckie in Peeing on the Tree

choices: Look For a Place For Chuckie to Poop
Give His Diaper to Chuckie and Let Him Use It
13511211211.content:
Suddenly, Chuckie felt an uncomfortable feeling in his bottom.

"Uh, Tommy, what if we have to poop?" Chuckie asked Tommy.

"Why do you ask?" Tommy asked Chuckie.

"Because right now, I really need to poop!" Chuckie told Tommy.

What does Tommy do?
13511211211.title: Chuckie Has To Poop

choices: Yes, Tommy Helped Him Put it On
No, He Put it On Himself
135112112112.content:
"You can use my diapie if you want." Tommy said to Chuckie as he handed him his untaped diaper. Desperate, Chuckie accepted.

Did Chuckie need help putting Tommy's diaper on?
135112112112.title: Give His Diaper to Chuckie and Let Him Use It

13515.content: Who else could we focus on?
13515.title: Someone Else

info.brief_description: Who needs a toilet when you can just go wherever you want?
info.description:
This is the tale of those who, for one reason or another, have chosen to forego toilets and instead pee and poop freely wherever they happen to be, whether by choice or not. Fanfiction options are also possible.

Just a few guidelines:
- No sexual activity
- No Shrinking/growth, tf, vore, etc. i.e. keep the story focused.

That's about it, honestly. Enter if you dare.
